relations.note: Both geometry and styling work together to define the unique visual device.

the white icon badge must carry a subtle drop shadow so it lifts off the blue box
This shadow is required on every instance

rules.intent: Maintain the specific asymmetric, high-contrast visual style of the proof-point callout device.
rules.rule_text: The Icon Callout Box uses a Light Blue (#E6F0F9) container with asymmetric corner radii (40px 8px 40px 8px), Brand Blue (#00529b) text, and a White (#ffffff) icon badge that has mirrored asymmetric radii (20px 4px 20px 4px) and carries a subtle drop shadow (rgba(1, 30, 69, 0.18)).
rules.snippets: These improvements occurred as early as four weeks after starting treatment, and they continued getting better through the end of the 52-week study.

quotes: <div style="position:relative; padding-left:40px;">
The blue box itself is inset from the left by half the badge width so the badge's outer half has room
left padding must clear the overhanging badge half plus a gap ( W/2 + 24px)
horizontally centered on the box's left edge (the edge is the badge's perpendicular bisector  50% over the blue, 50% over the page background)
place the badge so its center lands exactly on the box's left edge (badge left:0 inside a padding-left:40px wrapper  badge center 40px = box edge). Distance from badge center to box edge must be 0
If your real badge is a different size, keep the relationships  inset = W/2, box left-padding = W/2 + 24px, badge margin-top = H/2  and the bisector stays exact.

rules.intent: Maintain geometric proportions and layout integrity of the complex overlapping badge structure.
rules.rule_text: The icon callout box must obey the 50/50 vertical edge overhang layout rules. The container box must be inset from the left by exactly half the badge width (W/2). The badge's center must lie exactly on the box's left edge (distance is 0). The container's left padding must clear the overhanging badge half plus a gap (calculated as W/2 + 24px). The badge must be vertically centered on the box.
